mapper.sql: cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plan_name, cp.cutover_date, cp.start_time, cp.end_time, cp.status, cp.apply_user_id, cp.apply_time, cp.create_time, cp.update_time, p.project_name, ua.real_name AS apply_user_name

cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plan_name, cp.cutover_date, cp.start_time, cp.end_time, cp.status, cp.apply_user_id, cp.apply_time, cp.create_time, cp.update_time, cp.approval_user_id, cp.approval_time, cp.approval_remark, cp.customer_sign_link, cp.customer_sign_user, cp.customer_sign_time, cp.customer_sign_result, cp.customer_sign_remark, cp.actual_start_time, cp.actual_end_time, cp.impact_scope, cp.emergency_contact, cp.remark, cp.summary, cp.problem_improvement, p.project_name, ua.real_name AS apply_user_name, uv.real_name AS approval_user_name
LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = cp.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user ua ON ua.id = cp.apply_user_id AND ua.deleted = 0

LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = cp.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user ua ON ua.id = cp.apply_user_id AND ua.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user uv ON uv.id = cp.approval_user_id AND uv.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM cutover_plan cp
WHERE cp.id = #{id} AND cp.deleted = 0
